raw_form_input.scenario_summary: Applicant says she is employed full time and has not recently lost work, but the intake form shows zero earned income. The household is also reporting food and utility hardship.
raw_form_input.language_or_stress_notes: Possible data-entry mistake; follow-up needed before reasoning.

household_profile.language_or_stress_notes: Possible data-entry mistake; follow-up needed before reasoning.
household_profile.scenario_summary: Applicant says she is employed full time and has not recently lost work, but the intake form shows zero earned income. The household is also reporting food and utility hardship.

clarification_questions: Please resolve contradictory inputs: employment_status vs monthly_earned_income

matched_conditions: Household income 0 is within the prototype SNAP threshold 2800.
Food hardship or low-income signal supports prescreening relevance.
caveats: Contradictory intake data blocks a firm SNAP read.

matched_conditions: Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 3600.
caveats: Contradictory income details block a firm Medicaid/CHIP read.

matched_conditions: Heating-assistance need is present and income 0 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 4200.
caveats: Contradictory intake data blocks a firm LIHEAP read.

failed_conditions: No child under 5 or pregnancy signal was provided.

matched_conditions: The case includes navigation, ambiguity, or local-support signals that warrant a human/community referral.

priority_rationale: Local Referral ranked with prototype score 145.

Local Referral: Lease or eviction notice if relevant

next_steps: Clarify missing or contradictory intake details before relying on final prescreening.
Gather the listed documents for the highest-priority programs first.
Address heating-bill urgency first if there is a shutoff or overdue balance.
Contact a local navigator, benefits helper, or housing-support organization for follow-up.
Treat this as prescreening only, not an official eligibility determination.
checklist_explanation.user_explanation: Based on the information provided, this household may be a fit for Local Referral, SNAP, LIHEAP, Medicaid/CHIP. Local Referral: The case includes navigation, ambiguity, or local-support signals that warrant a human/community referral. SNAP: Household income 0 is within the prototype SNAP threshold 2800. LIHEAP: Heating-assistance need is present and income 0 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 4200. Medicaid/CHIP: Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 3600. Caveats: Contradictory intake data requires follow-up. Contradictory intake data blocks a firm SNAP read. Contradictory intake data blocks a firm LIHEAP read. Contradictory income details block a firm Medicaid/CHIP read. This is a prescreening and next-step guide, not an official determination.
visible_caveats: Contradictory intake data blocks a firm SNAP read.
Contradictory intake data blocks a firm LIHEAP read.
Contradictory income details block a firm Medicaid/CHIP read.
referral_notes: A local navigator or caseworker may help resolve ambiguity, local housing issues, or application barriers.
